task: v1.10-H Sender Gate Coverage Audit & Minimal Wiring

A_already_gated.notes: Imports pre_send_gate from market_radar_pre_send_gate. Calls pre_send_gate(signal, payload, target_env='test') between render and TGTransport.send(). Real send to test channel.
Multi-card matrix send. Imports pre_send_gate. Calls pre_send_gate(signal, payload, target_env='test') for each card. Real send to test channel.

B_newly_wired_this_round.original_status: Has own inline gate (scoring + cooldown + keyword filter). No pre_send_gate().
B_newly_wired_this_round.wiring: Added pre_send_gate() call before existing send_tg(). Builds minimal signal from card metadata (entity, asset, action). Gate runs in addition to existing scoring gate.
B_newly_wired_this_round.wiring_location: After score_card() check passes, before send_tg() call (line ~230 in original)
B_newly_wired_this_round.signal_structure: Built from card['entity'], card['asset'], card['action'] with source_type='hyperliquid_onchain'

C_not_market_radar.reason_excluded: News flow pipeline, not Market Radar card send chain. Sends aggregated previews, not individual signal cards.

C_not_market_radar.purpose: Sends project progress update card to TG
C_not_market_radar.reason_excluded: Project admin/status card, not Market Radar signal card. No signal→render→send pipeline.

C_not_market_radar.purpose: Sends TG alert quality summary card
C_not_market_radar.reason_excluded: Quality/metrics reporting, not Market Radar signal card. Sends aggregated quality stats.

C_not_market_radar.purpose: Manual TG draft test sender (dry-run default)
C_not_market_radar.reason_excluded: Test/debug utility for draft testing. Not part of automated Market Radar pipeline.

C_not_market_radar.purpose: Test script to verify token/chat_id config
C_not_market_radar.reason_excluded: Pure test utility. Not a sender in any pipeline.

C_not_market_radar.purpose: v16 pipeline — runs build_raw_signals → aggregate → render → send to TG
C_not_market_radar.reason_excluded: Uses v16 pipeline (not Market Radar v1.10 card router). Separate product with own dedup/rate-limiting. No render_card_payload() usage.

C_not_market_radar.purpose: Watcher-based live monitor with TG alert delivery
C_not_market_radar.reason_excluded: Watcher/alert pipeline (v07), not Market Radar v1.10 card system. Different signal source and pipeline.

C_not_market_radar.purpose: Builds and sends morning digest to TG
C_not_market_radar.reason_excluded: Digest/report product, not Market Radar individual card send. Sends aggregated daily summaries.
Twitter/X content relay, not Market Radar signal pipeline. Different data source and product.

D_uncertain.purpose: Core sender framework — MarketRadarSender class + TGTransport + send_from_manifest()
D_uncertain.uncertainty: Framework/library code. send_from_manifest() calls transport.send() without pre_send_gate(). However, consumers (v110e, v110f) wire pre_send_gate() externally. Adding pre_send_gate() here would affect all consumers and may break existing contracts. No clear signal dict available in send_from_manifest() — it receives a manifest, not a signal.
D_uncertain.recommendation: Keep as-is. Consumers are responsible for gating. Consider adding docstring note that callers must gate before calling send_from_manifest().

D_uncertain.purpose: Sends Market Radar board (aggregated multi-section content) to TG
D_uncertain.uncertainty: Board-level sender — sends pre-built board text from tg_market_radar_boards.csv. No individual signal/card structure. The board is an aggregated product with multiple sections. No clear single-signal to map to pre_send_gate(). However, it IS in the Market Radar pipeline (called by run_v09_market_radar_cycle.py).
D_uncertain.recommendation: If boards need gating, a separate board-level gate (board_pre_send_gate) may be needed. For now, record in inventory for human review.

D_uncertain.uncertainty: These are versioned scripts superseded by v1.10-E/F. _v110b uses SignalTrustGate directly (not pre_send_gate). _v110d dry-run only. _r2 has redacted tokens. They should not be used as active senders going forward.
D_uncertain.recommendation: Consider archiving to _archive/ or adding deprecation warning. No gating needed since they should not be run.
